subtitle: Scholar. Attorney. Advocate.
description: Criminologist, professor, researcher, and advocate for social and ecological justice. Advancing transformative scholarship that centers Black, queer, and marginalized voices.

features.title: Scholar
features.description: Advancing criminological theory through innovative research and critical analysis.

features.title: Attorney
features.description: Advocating for justice through legal expertise and policy reform.

features.title: Advocate
features.description: Championing social and ecological justice for marginalized communities.

missionSubtext: Bridging academic scholarship, legal advocacy, and social justice to create meaningful change
ctaSubtext: Interested in research collaboration, speaking engagements, or consulting on justice initiatives?
